hero.headline: Galgotias University Online MBA in Finance Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+, WES recognised. Total all-in cost Rs 86,400 across 2 years, the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU. Finance Management specialisation with Investment Analysis, Financial Risk Management, International Finance, and Managing Banks and Institutions in Sem 3-4. No EMI, no scholarships, no bundled perks.

sections.tldr: Galgotias Online MBA Finance Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised, Rs 86,400 all-in (second-lowest after IGNOU Rs 66,000). Sem 3-4 covers Financial Markets and Services, Investment Analysis, Financial Risk Management, Managing Banks and Institutions, and International Finance. No EMI, no scholarships, no perks. Best fit for budget-first learners who want a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA credential at under Rs 1 lakh.

about.body:
Galgotias University, Greater Noida, was established in 2011 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The university is WES recognised, which helps graduates applying for international credential evaluation.

The Online MBA in Finance Management covers core MBA subjects in Sem 1-2 and adds specialisation depth in Sem 3-4 with Financial Markets and Services, Investment Analysis, Financial Risk Management, Managing Banks and Institutions, and International Finance. Common subjects like Strategic Management and Business Communication round out the final-year curriculum.

The defining feature is cost. At Rs 86,400 all-in, Galgotias is the second-cheapest MBA on EdifyEdu after IGNOU (Rs 66,000). The trade-off is clear: no EMI facility, no scholarships, no Coursera or placement perks, and limited brand recognition compared to NIRF-ranked competitors like Amity or Chandigarh University. For working professionals who prioritise a low upfront cost and a valid NAAC A+ credential, Galgotias Finance Management is worth serious consideration.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Markets and Services
sem3Subjects.description: Study Indian capital markets, money markets, mutual funds, and financial intermediaries. Covers SEBI regulations, primary and secondary market operations.

sem3Subjects.name: Investment Analysis
sem3Subjects.description: Apply fundamental and technical analysis frameworks to equity and debt instruments. Covers DCF valuation, PE multiples, and bond pricing.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Risk Management
sem3Subjects.description: Identify, measure, and mitigate financial risk using VaR, credit risk models, hedging strategies, and enterprise risk frameworks.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Develop written and verbal communication for corporate settings. Covers report writing, presentation skills, and business correspondence.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive environments using Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, and balanced scorecard frameworks. Build corporate and business-level strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Initial Phase)
sem3Subjects.description: Define research problem, conduct literature review, and finalise methodology for the MBA thesis project.

sem4Subjects.name: Managing Banks and Institutions
sem4Subjects.description: Study bank management, credit appraisal, NPA management, treasury operations, and RBI regulatory frameworks for commercial banking.

sem4Subjects.name: International Finance
sem4Subjects.description: Cover foreign exchange markets, multinational capital budgeting, cross-border financing, FOREX risk management, and international trade finance.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Ethics and CSR
sem4Subjects.description: Examine ethical decision-making frameworks, corporate governance codes, CSR reporting standards, and stakeholder management.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Final Phase)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete data analysis, write findings, and defend the MBA thesis before the evaluation panel.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 core subjects are common across all Galgotias Online MBA specialisations. See the main Galgotias Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Finance Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Commercial and cooperative banking, NBFCs and microfinance, Insurance and wealth advisory, Corporate treasury, Financial consulting and audit firms

**Entry-level roles:** Financial Analyst, Credit Analyst, Junior Investment Analyst, Treasury Associate, Accounts Manager

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Finance Manager, Credit Manager, Branch Manager (Banking), Risk Analyst, Portfolio Analyst

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Finance, CFO, VP Treasury, Chief Risk Officer, Investment Director

**Typical hiring organisations:** HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Kotak Mahindra, Yes Bank, IIFL, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, PwC

Note: Galgotias does not offer dedicated placement support or corporate tie-ups for its online MBA. Career advancement depends on your existing professional network and self-sourced opportunities.

skills.body:
The Galgotias Finance Management specialisation builds these skills across Sem 3-4:

**Technical skills:**
- Financial Markets and Services: understanding capital market instruments, SEBI regulations, mutual fund structures, and financial intermediary operations
- Investment Analysis: equity valuation using DCF and relative methods, bond pricing, portfolio return calculation, and technical chart analysis
- Financial Risk Management: VaR computation, credit risk assessment, hedging strategy design, and enterprise risk framework application
- International Finance: FOREX risk management, cross-border capital budgeting, trade finance instruments, and multinational treasury operations

**Applied skills:**
- Managing Banks and Institutions: credit appraisal, NPA analysis, treasury management, and RBI compliance frameworks for banking professionals
- Master Thesis: independent research design, data collection, statistical analysis, and academic writing

**Soft skills:** Business communication for corporate reporting, strategic thinking for management presentations, ethical reasoning for governance and compliance roles.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Galgotias Online MBA Finance Management against peers on EdifyEdu:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper and has the strongest government university brand. However, IGNOU lacks a modern LMS, has no live lectures, and offers limited analytics or engagement tools. Galgotias provides a structured online platform at a marginally higher cost.

**vs Amity Online MBA Finance (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.6x the cost with NIRF #22 University ranking, larger alumni network, and stronger pan-India brand recognition. If brand weight matters for your career goals, Amity justifies the premium. Galgotias wins on pure cost.

**vs Chandigarh University Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 University, offers PwC co-teaching modules, and has a well-established online division. CU costs nearly 2x Galgotias. For budget-first learners who do not need PwC certification, Galgotias is the cheaper alternative.

**vs LPU Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,61,000-2,00,000):** LPU offers zero-cost EMI, Coursera bundled access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU provides stronger career services and brand recognition. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the cost but lacks EMI and perks.

**vs DPU Pune Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU carries NIRF #41 ranking, NAAC A++ accreditation, and strong healthcare-adjacent brand in Maharashtra. DPU costs over 2x Galgotias. For Pune/Mumbai careers, DPU brand weight justifies the premium.

fees.body:
Galgotias University Online MBA in Finance Management has a single fee track with no EMI, no scholarships, and no bundled perks.

**Total all-in cost: Rs 86,400**

- Tuition fee: Rs 76,200 (Rs 33,000/year approx, paid per semester)
- Examination fee: Rs 8,000 (Rs 4,000/year)
- Registration fee: Rs 1,200 (one-time)
- Alumni fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)

**No EMI facility** from the university. No third-party EMI partner announced.
**No scholarships** or fee waivers available.
**No bundled perks** such as Coursera, LinkedIn Learning, or placement guarantees.

This is the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU at Rs 66,000. The fee advantage is the primary reason to consider Galgotias over NIRF-ranked competitors.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Galgotias University, Greater Noida. It carries the MBA designation with Finance Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is mentioned per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Galgotias Online MBA Finance Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Vikram
items.liked: At Rs 86,400, this is genuinely the cheapest NAAC A+ MBA I found. The Investment Analysis and Financial Risk Management subjects were well-structured.
items.disliked: No EMI option made the upfront payment challenging. Career services are essentially non-existent for online students.
items.body: I work in a cooperative bank and needed a formal MBA credential for promotion eligibility. Galgotias delivered the degree at a price I could afford without a loan. The fee advantage is real. Brand recognition outside UP is limited, but for credential-driven career moves, it works.

items.name: Sneha
items.liked: Financial Markets and Services gave me practical understanding of SEBI regulations and mutual fund structures. The LMS was functional and easy to use.
items.disliked: No Coursera access, no placement support, no networking events. You are on your own for career advancement.
items.body: Decent programme for the price. I chose Galgotias over IGNOU because the online platform is better structured. But if you can afford Rs 1.5L or more, CU or LPU will give you stronger brand recognition and career support.

items.name: Rajesh
items.liked: Managing Banks and Institutions and International Finance were relevant to my banking career. The WES recognition was a bonus for my Canada PR application.
items.disliked: Limited peer interaction in live sessions. Faculty response time on the LMS was slow at times.
items.body: For under Rs 90,000, you get a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA. That is the core value proposition. Do not expect premium perks, strong alumni networks, or recruiter partnerships. If the budget is your primary constraint, Galgotias Finance Management is a rational choice.

faqs.question: Is Galgotias University Online MBA UGC-DEB approved?
faqs.answer: Yes. Galgotias University is UGC-DEB approved for online degree programmes. The online MBA is legally equivalent to an on-campus MBA for employment and higher education purposes.

faqs.question: Why is Galgotias Online MBA so cheap compared to other universities?
faqs.answer: Galgotias does not bundle Coursera, placement services, EMI facilities, or scholarship programmes. The Rs 86,400 fee covers tuition, exams, registration, and alumni membership only. The low fee reflects a no-frills delivery model.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer EMI for the online MBA?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer any EMI facility or third-party EMI partner for the online MBA. The fee is paid directly to the university per semester.

faqs.question: Is the Galgotias online MBA degree WES recognised?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Galgotias MBA degree is WES recognised, which is useful for graduates applying for international credential evaluation, particularly for Canada and Australia immigration.

faqs.question: How does Galgotias compare to IGNOU for an online MBA?
faqs.answer: IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper at Rs 66,000 and carries stronger government university brand recognition. However, IGNOU lacks a modern LMS with live lectures and analytics. Galgotias provides a more structured online learning platform at a slightly higher cost.

chooseIf: Your top priority is the lowest possible fee for a NAAC A+ MBA. At Rs 86,400, Galgotias is second only to IGNOU.
You need a WES-recognised MBA for international credential evaluation at minimal cost.
You already have a stable career and need a formal MBA credential for promotion or eligibility, not brand prestige or placement support.
consider: If you need EMI, LPU Online MBA Finance at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) offers 24-month zero-cost EMI at Rs 6,733/month.
If NIRF ranking and brand recognition matter, Chandigarh University (NIRF #19, Rs 1,65,000) or Amity (NIRF #22, Rs 2,25,000) are stronger options.
If you want the absolute cheapest MBA, IGNOU at Rs 66,000 is Rs 20,400 less, though it lacks Galgotias' structured LMS.
